title: The Last Path
content:
The recovered GPS logs from Vane's phone are sparse, but they pinpoint two distinct locations he visited on his final afternoon.||1. 'The Blackwood' Restaurant - Financial District.
2. Warehouse 14, Pier 9 - Industrial Zone.||One was for a high-profile meeting, the other a desperate attempt to hide. Tomorrow morning, you'll have to choose where to begin your search for the physical evidence Vane left behind.
